dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Worktree node_modules missing turbo binary on fresh worktree
dogfoodPatterns.description: On EM cycle startup, turbo not found in worktree node_modules. Must run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile to fix. Worktrees do not automatically inherit correct node_modules from parent.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add pnpm install --frozen-lockfile as pre-build step in EM startup scripts.
